title: Fastllm: A LLM inference library that runs DeepSeek-V4 with 10GB VRAM
abstract: Tired of stale chatbots? Try Fastllm! It runs DeepSeek-V4 with just 10GB VRAM, making your conversations as engaging as a movie plot. No more lag or awkward silences—spruce up your dialogue today!
abstract_zh: 你还在为老掉牙的聊天机器人而烦恼吗？来试试Fastllm吧！它用10GB显存跑起了DeepSeek-V4，保证让你的对话像电影情节一样精彩！不再卡顿、不再冷场，快给你的对话加点料吧！
